summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Transporter-Pro SaaS application. Backend APIs tested with 100% success rate (17/17 tests passed). Frontend UI tested with excellent results - all major features working including admin dashboard, subscription management, driver management, notifications, and complete workflow integration.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Admin driver listing with stats (/api/admin/drivers GET)
Complete delivery workflow: Admin creates → Assigns driver → Driver validates → Auto-invoice generation
Subscription page with 3 plans (Solo 49€, Croissance 199€, Flotte Pro 499€)
Driver management UI with modal forms
Deliveries table with assign driver functionality

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor accessibility warnings only)
